title: fraxinus chinensis subsp. chinensis
intro: Fraxinus chinensis subsp. chinensis, also known as the Chinese ash or Mongolian ash, is a deciduous tree species native to China and Mongolia, characterized by its compound leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus chinensis subsp. chinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herb in treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus chinensis subsp. chinensis include tea, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
